series_metadata.series_description: Nurseries are inspected yearly by Plant Pest Control Personnel. If the inspection does not reveal any disease or insect problems and the stock is able to be sold, the Nursery is issued a Certificate. Copies of all supporting documentation regarding the inspection, findings, and certification are kept in the division’s Nursery Files i.e. (applications, inspection reports, rejection notices, and restrictions)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: original document will be scanned and paper copy will be retained document is verified readable in our PPC drive; once paper copy is verified readable it will be put in waste paper. ; Electronic: originals are scanned into PPC drive and will be retained electronically
